title: ILOSTAT — Employment-to-Population Ratio, Labour Force Participation Rate, and Informal Employment Share (by sex and age)
countries: ALL (world; IRN present in EMP_DWAP/EAP_DWAP only — see notes on informal-employment coverage gap)
time_coverage: EMP_DWAP_SEX_AGE_RT_A: 1947-2027; EAP_DWAP_SEX_AGE_RT_A: 1946-2027; SDG_0831_SEX_ECO_RT_A (ICLS13 def.): 2000-2027; SDG_B831_SEX_ECO_RT_A (ICLS19 def.): 2014-2025
units: percent (%), broken out by classif1 = sex x age group (EMP_DWAP/EAP_DWAP) or sex x economic activity (SDG_0831/SDG_B831)
license_terms: ILOSTAT open data terms (CC BY 4.0 IGO)
notes: Four full-world bulk indicator extracts kept whole (natural ILOSTAT download unit; largest file 39MB, well under the 500MB size-discipline cap). Verified row counts for our target countries: EAP_DWAP_SEX_AGE_RT_A has 2,073 IRN rows, EMP_DWAP_SEX_AGE_RT_A has 1,689 IRN rows (both cover the full sex x age-group breakdown across many years, so high row counts reflect breakdown cells, not distinct years). IMPORTANT DATA GAP: Iran (IRN) has ZERO rows in both SDG_0831_SEX_ECO_RT_A and SDG_B831_SEX_ECO_RT_A (grep-verified) -- ILO does not appear to have official informal-employment estimates for Iran under either the ICLS13 (SDG_0831) or ICLS19 (SDG_B831) definitions, likely because Iran's Statistical Centre labour force survey does not publish informality per the ILO/SDG 8.3.1 methodology. Venezuela (VEN) has 42 rows in SDG_0831 (old definition) but 0 in SDG_B831 (new definition) -- so Venezuela informal-employment data is available only under the older ICLS13 methodology and only for a limited set of sex x economic-activity cells. Saudi Arabia (SAU) and USA also show 0 rows in both informal-employment files. Turkey (TUR), Russia (RUS), Spain (ESP), Portugal (PRT), Greece (GRC) all have substantial coverage in SDG_0831; RUS/ESP/PRT/GRC also covered under the newer SDG_B831 definition; Korea (KOR) has 42 rows in SDG_B831 only. Users of this dataset for Iran/Venezuela informality analysis should note this gap explicitly rather than assume the absence means zero informal employment.

failures.note: No usable Iran (IRN) or Saudi Arabia (SAU) or USA rows found in SDG_0831_SEX_ECO_RT_A.csv or SDG_B831_SEX_ECO_RT_A.csv -- files still retained as they cover our other target countries and the absence itself is a documented finding.
